mdRecord.dcterms:title: Old Floyd Jail
mdRecord.dcterms:description: 230_D6_CephasAHylton 6 family photos of the living quarter section 1930 Floyd Jail with attached garage sheriff - Cephas A. Hylton his son Bill the frame sheriff's house behind courthouse and the two-story frame Hestel Sowers barber shop across the alleyway
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Courthouses
Jails
Barbershops
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
